comment: Operator-curated quarantine directives for facts the honesty eval flagged as WRONG. Knowledge about what is wrong lives HERE (data), never in code. Each entry cites its evidence.

entries.name: 퀴리
entries.reason: eval_honesty 2026-07-05: '퀴리는 핵분열을 발견한 사람 가운데 하나이다' is false — nuclear fission was discovered by Otto Hahn/Fritz Strassmann (1938), interpreted by Lise Meitner/Otto Frisch; the Curies discovered radium and polonium. Wrong-only concept: removal makes the engine abstain honestly, and the abstain-to-ingest loop can re-learn the term from a grounded source.

entries.name: 중력
entries.reason: eval_honesty 2026-07-05: answer tail '이는 이론의 한 종류입니다' is a wrong graft — gravity is an interaction/force, not a kind of theory (중력 이론 is a theory ABOUT gravity). The description itself is correct and stays.
